description: Eval template — replace skill_name, prompts, and expected_output

evals.name: happy-path
evals.prompt: REPLACE: A realistic user prompt that exercises the core use case
evals.expected_output: REPLACE: Specific description of what a correct response looks like

assertions.value: REPLACE: key text that must appear in the output

evals.name: edge-case
evals.prompt: REPLACE: A prompt that tests an edge case or unusual input
evals.expected_output: REPLACE: How the skill should handle this edge case

evals.name: invalid-input
evals.prompt: REPLACE: A prompt with missing or invalid input to test graceful handling
evals.expected_output: REPLACE: The skill should ask for clarification or explain what's missing
